code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    high = df['high']
    low = df['low']
    close = df['close']
    period = params['period'][0]
    tr = np.maximum(high - low, np.abs(high - close.shift(1)), np.abs(low - close.shift(1)))
    atr = tr.rolling(period).mean()
    up_move = high - high.shift(1)
    down_move = low.shift(1) - low
    plus_dm = np.where((up_move > down_move) & (up_move > 0), up_move, 0)
    minus_dm = np.where((down_move > up_move) & (down_move > 0), down_move, 0)
    plus_di = 100 * (pd.Series(plus_dm).rolling(period).mean() / atr)
    minus_di = 100 * (pd.Series(minus_dm).rolling(period).mean() / atr)
    dx = 100 * np.abs(plus_di - minus_di) / (plus_di + minus_di)
    adx = dx.rolling(period).mean()
    entry_long = (adx > params['adx_threshold'][0]) & (plus_di > minus_di)
    entry_short = (adx > params['adx_threshold'][0]) & (minus_di > plus_di)
    exit_long = (adx < params['adx_exit'][0]) | (minus_di > plus_di)
    exit_short = (adx < params['adx_exit'][0]) | (plus_di > minus_di)
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    position = 0
    for i in range(period, len(df)):
        if position == 0:
            if entry_long.iloc[i]:
                signal.iloc[i] = 1
                position = 1
            elif entry_short.iloc[i]:
                signal.iloc[i] = -1
                position = -1
        elif position == 1:
            if exit_long.iloc[i]:
                signal.iloc[i] = 0
                position = 0
        elif position == -1:
            if exit_short.iloc[i]:
                signal.iloc[i] = 0
                position = 0
    return signal
rationale: Silver on H4 exhibits strong trending behaviour during macroeconomic news and industrial demand shifts; ADX identifies trend strength and directional indicators capture the trend direction, allowing trend-following with clear exit rules to avoid prolonged reversals.

self_critique.why_this_might_be_noise: ADX can be slow and whipsaw in ranging markets; silver can be choppy despite high volatility, leading to false signals.
self_critique.what_would_disprove_this: A market regime where ADX remains high but price oscillates violently without sustained direction, causing repeated entries and exits at a loss.
